data: Kapur et al. (2026)

Evaluation approaches should prioritize specificity over verbosity

tables.table_title: Summary of Study on Hallucinations Live in Variance
data: Flouro and Chadwick (2026)
Semantic Stability (SS)
Hallucinations live in variance: they arise when semantically equivalent prompts activate inconsistent internal pathways
Evaluation approaches should prioritize reliability over accuracy

tables.table_title: Summary of Study on Unified Framework for Emotion Recognition and Sentiment Analysis
data: Qiao et al. (2026)
EGMF
Unified framework for emotion recognition and sentiment analysis via expert-guided multimodal fusion with LLMs
Emotion recognition and sentiment analysis can be improved by integrating multiple modalities
